## Summary
- Work item: Feature / Enabler / ADR
- Why (1–2 lines):
- Roots touched: backend / bot / frontend

## Scope
- [ ] One feature/enabler only
- [ ] No unrelated changes

## Impact
- [ ] Spec/ADR updated (if required)
- [ ] OpenAPI/events updated (if required)
- [ ] Migration included (if backend persistence changed)

## Engineering
- [ ] Boundaries respected (hex backend / no cross-root imports)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (unit always; integration/contract if required)
